subtitle: I AM YOUR AI PARENTING COACH
chat_error_delayed: The response is delayed. Please try again.
kyk_modal_desc: Knowing your child's personality through KYK helps us give more tailored parenting advice. 🌱
kyk_modal_limit: Without KYK, you can ask up to {limit} questions per day.
kyk_limit_reached: Complete KYK to unlock unlimited questions! [Take KYK now](/kyk)

tips.title: ✅ Be Specific with Praise
tips.body: Praise actions, not outcomes. "I liked how you cleaned up your toys." keeps motivation steady.

tips.title: 🧠 Name the Feeling First
tips.body: Try "You seem frustrated." Naming emotions reduces intensity and opens cooperation.

tips.title: 🎯 One Instruction at a Time
tips.body: Short, single-step directions work better than multi-step commands.

tips.title: 🟦 Offer Two Good Choices
tips.body: "Red cup or blue cup?" gives autonomy while keeping boundaries.

tips.title: 🤝 Connect Before Correct
tips.body: A brief connection ("I'm here.") makes guidance land better.

tips.title: ⏳ Use a Calm Countdown
tips.body: Give a gentle 10→0 countdown for transitions instead of repeating yourself.

tips.title: 🩹 Repair After a Hard Moment
tips.body: After conflict: "We both got upset. Let's try again." Repair builds trust.

tips.title: 🧩 Tiny Routines Win
tips.body: Small, repeatable routines beat big plans. Keep it easy to do daily.

tips.title: 🍎 Fuel First
tips.body: Snack + water often fixes "mystery" meltdowns faster than talking.

tips.title: 🌙 Morning Wins Start at Night
tips.body: Lay out clothes and bags the night before to cut morning friction.

tips.title: 💛 Front-Load Attention
tips.body: 10 minutes of focused attention reduces attention-seeking later.

tips.title: 🛑 Validate + Boundary
tips.body: "You're mad. It's okay to be mad. It's not okay to hit."

tips.title: 🔁 Practice "Redo"
tips.body: "Let's redo that with a calmer voice." Teaches skill without punishment.

tips.title: 🎉 Celebrate Small Improvements
tips.body: Progress is the goal. Notice the 5% change and name it.

tips.title: 🧡 Hold the Boundary, Keep the Warmth
tips.body: Firm + kind works. "I won't let you throw. I'm here."
